title: SixtyGig Resource Pack Remake
description: SixtyGig Resource Packs remake by Biantao and MoYu. This resource pack mainly features an oil painting style. Besides, this resource pack not only has a unique style but also ensures vanilla friendly.
body:
SixtyGig Remake is made by MoYu and Biantao. It maximally recreated the original style and appearance of the painting.

This resource pack mainly features an oil painting style. Besides, this resource pack not only has a unique style but also ensures vanilla friendly.

This resource pack is performance-friendly, so basically any computer can run this resource pack without any problem.

Place this resource pack in the [resourcepacks] folder, and then you can directly select and apply it in the game. This pack works with any other resource pack.

The Bilibili profiles of the authors：
Biantao : 
https://space.bilibili.com/3218476?spm_id_from=333.788.upinfo.head.click
